board.title: Board
board.cellSize.desc: Adjust board and piece display size
board.coordinates.desc: Show coordinate labels on board edges
game.title: Game Hints
game.lastMove.desc: Highlight the origin and destination of the previous move
game.legalMoves.desc: Highlight legal destination squares for the selected piece
game.turnBorder.desc: Show a highlighted border indicating whose turn it is
movelist.title: Move List
movelist.show.desc: Display the full move record and variations beside the board
movelist.text.desc: Display Chinese notation for each move alongside move numbers
movelist.fontSize.desc: Font size for the move list
movelist.autoJump.desc: Where to position the board when opening a game
margin.title: Board Margins

confirm.saveNew: PGN is empty. Save history as PGN?
confirm.saveBranchesMsg: The game has branches. Choose how to save:
codeblock.title: Code Block Names
codeblock.restartNotice: Changes require restarting the plugin or Obsidian to take effect.
codeblock.invalidName: Invalid name "{name}" ignored. Only lowercase letters, digits, and hyphens are allowed.
codeblock.xiangqiAliases.desc: Custom aliases for list code block, comma separated
codeblock.xqAliases.desc: Custom aliases for FEN generation code block, comma separated
codeblock.treeAliases.desc: Custom aliases for branch diagram code block, comma separated
codeblock.genfenSaveType.desc: Code block type when FEN saves
settings.restartRequired.title: Restart Required
settings.restartRequired.desc: The following settings require restarting the plugin or Obsidian to take effect.

pgn.enable.desc: Register PGN file view for opening .pgn files
pgn.extensions.desc: Custom file extensions for PGN view, comma separated
engine.title: Engine
engine.depth.desc: Engine analysis search depth (1-30). Higher depth = more accurate but slower
save.title: Save
save.saveEval.desc: Automatically save evaluation results to the game record after analysis
save.saveEvalPrompt.desc: Prompt whether to include engine evaluation data when saving
engine.downloadFailed: Download failed, you can manually download files to the plugin directory
